name: healthcare_staffing_model_assigns_southport_auto_ben
premise: Infection control wants a ward closed; bed management is refusing without a signed surge plan from the county. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare staffing model assigns southport auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as autonomy against beneficence; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Elena Dubois
agents.identity: I am Elena Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Hector Ibrahim, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of beneficence.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of autonomy even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Elena Dubois must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Elena Dubois do?
